personalInfo.name: Dipanjali Pramanick
personalInfo.title: Backend-focused Full Stack Developer
personalInfo.summary: Backend-focused Full Stack Developer with 2.9 years of experience. Expertise in building secure, high-performing APIs and backend systems. Improved API efficiency, automated workflows, and delivered scalable backend architectures. Strong in system design, authentication, performance optimization, and cross-functional collaboration.

achievements: Built and optimized 100+ RESTful APIs for ERP modules using Node.js and Express, improving response efficiency and reducing data retrieval time across modules.
Implemented role-based authentication, secure session flows, and permission layers, reducing unauthorized access incidents.
Automated backend processes in Directus with custom flows, endpoints, and webhooks, reducing manual admin work by 30%.
Developed server-generated PDFs using Puppeteer, enabling 100% automated invoice and report creation for internal teams.
Improved database efficiency by optimizing MongoDB queries and MySQL schemas, resulting in faster record fetch and reduced query latency.
Collaborated with Angular teams to integrate backend modules, ensuring seamless data flow and API reliability across two production platforms.
Built responsive Angular modules and reusable components, reducing UI dev time by 25% for upcoming sprints.
Integrated Stripe payment gateway, improving checkout reliability and reducing payment failures.
Conducted debugging, testing, and code reviews to maintain modular and scalable codebase.
Developed UI components with HTML, CSS, and JS to enhance UX consistency across projects.

education.degree: PGD (Full Stack Software Engineering - JAVA Specialization)

projects.title: Westroad ERP System (MERN)
projects.description: Built 50+ high-performance RESTful APIs for Booking, Allotment, and Configuration modules; engineered APIs for real-time availability & complex pricing logic; implemented RBAC authentication, automated PDFs via Puppeteer, optimized MongoDB queries, and integrated with React frontend teams.

projects.title: Infinity Print Suite (Directus + Angular + MySQL)
projects.description: Developed dynamic customization APIs, server-side rendering endpoints for print-ready PDFs, core e-commerce backend for product listings and order flows, secure asset storage APIs, and authentication/authorization for US-based systems.
